description: The concept expands to include everything around knowledge, AI, tools, communication and execution.
manifestation: Every useful adjacent object is called IPaC.
protection_rule: Keep IPaC bounded by living meaning → knowledge → canon/trace → feedback/review/rebuild.

description: Concept discussion starts producing architecture or governance design.
manifestation: Entities and invariants are extended beyond recovered archive evidence.
protection_rule: Concept Artifact may define concepts and model, not redesign architecture.

description: Concept work is pulled into MVP, MVI, channels, dashboards or launch plans.
manifestation: Publication channels start shaping the concept core.
protection_rule: Park execution signals; import only Projection as a general concept.

description: Internally coherent or beautiful concepts are treated as field-validated.
manifestation: Meaning Bottleneck or intersubjectivity is described as proven externally.
protection_rule: State validation type; validated ≠ field validated.

description: Too many terms obscure the central concept.
manifestation: Reader cannot distinguish Knowledge Clump, Artifact, Canon, Trace, Projection.
protection_rule: Maintain glossary with role and 'not-is' boundaries.

description: Strong metaphors become mistaken for operational concepts.
manifestation: Protein-silicon resonance or semantic superconductivity enters core too early.
protection_rule: Mark metaphors as speculative or parked unless operationalized.

description: The concept is reduced to Obsidian, Git, Codex, RAG or a workflow tool.
manifestation: A tool becomes mistaken for IPaC itself.
protection_rule: Tools may support artifacts/trace/projections but are not IPaC.

description: AI creates a coherent but too complete concept artifact and hides uncertainty.
manifestation: Speculative elements are polished into apparent maturity.
protection_rule: Require maturity status, risks and uncertainty for each concept.
